about.heroSubtitle: Vesta is a modern fashion house blending timeless wardrobe staples with technology — including a virtual try-on studio that lets you see the fit before you buy.
about.storyP1: Vesta started with a simple idea: shopping for clothes online should feel as confident as standing in front of a mirror. We curate versatile, well-made pieces and pair them with tools that take the guesswork out of buying.
about.storyP2: From our virtual try-on studio to fast, trackable delivery, every part of the experience is designed to help you find what fits — your body, your style, and your day.

values.title: Considered quality
values.desc: Each piece is chosen for fabric, fit and longevity — fewer, better things you'll reach for again and again.

values.title: Try before you buy
values.desc: Our AI virtual try-on lets you preview garments on yourself, reducing returns and second-guessing.

values.title: Honest service
values.desc: Transparent pricing, real-time order tracking and a return policy that treats you fairly.

about.projectBody: Vesta is a full-stack graduation thesis: a fashion e-commerce platform with an integrated AI virtual try-on, built with React and Spring Boot.
about.school: HEDSPI — Hanoi University of Science and Technology

collections.heroSubtitle: Shop by mood and moment — edits pulled together from across the wardrobe.

items.title: Everyday Shirts
items.desc: From crisp office to easy weekend

lookbook.heroSubtitle: Styling inspiration from the season — captured on and off the street.

contact.heroSubtitle: Questions about an order, sizing or a return? We're here to help.
contact.address: 211 Khương Trung, Thanh Xuân District, Hà Nội, Vietnam
contact.mailHint: This opens your email app with the message ready to send.

faq.heroSubtitle: Quick answers to the things customers ask most.

items.q: How does the virtual try-on work?
items.a: Open any product and tap “Try on”. Upload a photo of yourself and our AI renders the garment on you, so you can preview the fit before buying.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept Cash on Delivery (COD), VNPAY and international cards via Stripe.
Delivery is handled by GHN and the fee is calculated from your address at checkout. Orders over 500,000₫ ship free.

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: Go to Account → Orders. Once an order ships you'll see its status and a GHN tracking link that updates automatically.
Yes — while an order is still Pending you can cancel it yourself from the order detail page. After that, contact us and we'll help.
Unworn items with tags can be returned within 7 days of delivery. See the Shipping & Returns page for the full policy.

shipping.heroSubtitle: How we get your order to you — and what happens if something isn't right.

shipItems.title: Nationwide delivery via GHN
shipItems.desc: We ship across Vietnam through Giao Hàng Nhanh (GHN). Your shipping fee is calculated from your delivery address at checkout.

shipItems.title: Free over 500,000₫
shipItems.desc: Orders with a subtotal of 500,000₫ or more ship free. Below that, the GHN rate for your area applies.

shipItems.title: Delivery time
shipItems.desc: Most orders arrive within 2–5 business days depending on your province. You'll see an estimated delivery date once the order ships.

shipItems.title: Live tracking
shipItems.desc: After your order ships, the status syncs automatically from GHN and a tracking link appears on your order detail page.

returnItems.title: 7-day returns
returnItems.desc: Unworn items in original condition with tags attached can be returned within 7 days of delivery.

returnItems.title: How to request
returnItems.desc: Contact us with your order number and the items you'd like to return, and we'll guide you through the next steps.

returnItems.title: Refunds
returnItems.desc: Once your return is received and checked, refunds are issued to your original payment method. COD orders are refunded by bank transfer.

chat.title: Vesta Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask about our products
chat.intro: Hi! I'm Vesta's shopping assistant. Ask about our products — e.g. "black jacket under 500k" — or our shipping & returns policy.
